title: Monanthos subbilobatus
taxonomy: Monanthos subbilobatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Monanthos, which is a small genus of plants native to Australia. The plant is often found in the eastern parts of Australia, particularly in Queensland and New South Wales.
